---
title: "Threat Sources"
subtitle: "World map of active threat IPs (FeodoTracker + ThreatFox), past 24 hrs"
---

```{r setup}
#| include: false
source("R/helpers.R")
DATA_CYBER <- file.path(DATA_ROOT, "cybersecurity")

read_csv_safe <- function(p) {
  if (!file.exists(p) || file.size(p) == 0) return(tibble::tibble())
  suppressWarnings(readr::read_csv(p, show_col_types = FALSE))
}

current  <- read_csv_safe(file.path(DATA_CYBER, "current_threats.csv"))
province <- read_csv_safe(file.path(DATA_CYBER, "province_daily.csv"))
```

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
**Attribution.** Threat data from
[Abuse.ch FeodoTracker](https://feodotracker.abuse.ch/) and
[ThreatFox](https://threatfox.abuse.ch/) (both CC0).
IP→province geolocation by [ip-api.com](https://ip-api.com/) (free
non-commercial tier). Hosting location does not identify attackers.
:::

```{r have-data}
#| include: false
have_data <- nrow(current) > 0
have_geo  <- have_data && any(!is.na(current$lat))
```

## World map of active threats {#map}

```{r map}
#| echo: false
#| eval: !expr have_geo
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(echarts4r))

mapdata <- current |>
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(lat), !is.na(lon)) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    label = paste0(ifelse(is.na(city), "", paste0(city, ", ")),
                   ifelse(is.na(region_name), "", paste0(region_name, ", ")),
                   country),
    color = ifelse(source == "FeodoTracker", "#bc4749", "#e07a5f")
  )

mapdata |>
  e_charts(lon) |>
  e_geo(
    roam = TRUE,
    itemStyle    = list(areaColor = "#f8f9fa", borderColor = "#adb5bd"),
    emphasis     = list(itemStyle = list(areaColor = "#dee2e6"))
  ) |>
  e_scatter(lat, coord_system = "geo",
            symbol_size = 6,
            itemStyle = list(color = htmlwidgets::JS(sprintf(
              "function(p){ var src = %s; return src[p.dataIndex] === 'FeodoTracker' ? '#bc4749' : '#e07a5f'; }",
              jsonlite::toJSON(mapdata$source)
            )))) |>
  e_tooltip(formatter = htmlwidgets::JS(sprintf("
    function(p){
      var labels   = %s;
      var malware  = %s;
      var sources  = %s;
      var i = p.dataIndex;
      return '<b>' + sources[i] + '</b><br/>' +
             labels[i] + '<br/>' +
             'Malware: ' + (malware[i] || '—');
    }",
    jsonlite::toJSON(mapdata$label),
    jsonlite::toJSON(mapdata$malware_family),
    jsonlite::toJSON(mapdata$source)
  ))) |>
  e_title(sprintf("Active threat infrastructure — %d IPs across %d provinces",
                  nrow(mapdata),
                  dplyr::n_distinct(paste0(mapdata$country, "|", mapdata$region_name)))) |>
  apply_econ_theme()
```

```{r no-data}
#| echo: false
#| eval: !expr '!have_geo'
htmltools::div(class = "callout callout-note",
  htmltools::p("Threat-source data isn't populated yet, or geolocation hasn't ",
               "completed. The CI pipeline fetches it on first run; check ",
               "back after the next deploy."))
```

## Top provinces — current 24-hour snapshot {#provinces}

```{r province-table}
#| echo: false
#| eval: !expr have_data
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(reactable))
latest <- if (nrow(province) > 0) max(province$snapshot_date) else NA
top <- province |>
  dplyr::filter(snapshot_date == latest) |>
  dplyr::group_by(country, region_name) |>
  dplyr::summarize(n = sum(n), .groups = "drop") |>
  dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(n)) |>
  utils::head(25)

reactable(
  top,
  striped = TRUE, highlight = TRUE, compact = TRUE,
  theme = reactableTheme(borderColor = "#dee2e6"),
  defaultPageSize = 25,
  columns = list(
    country     = colDef(name = "Country", minWidth = 160),
    region_name = colDef(name = "Province / region", minWidth = 200),
    n           = colDef(name = "Active IPs", maxWidth = 120,
                         style = list(fontWeight = 600))
  )
)
```

## Top hosting networks (ASNs) — current snapshot {#asns}

```{r asn-table}
#| echo: false
#| eval: !expr have_data
asns <- current |>
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(as_name), nzchar(as_name)) |>
  dplyr::count(as_name, sort = TRUE) |>
  utils::head(20)

reactable(
  asns,
  striped = TRUE, highlight = TRUE, compact = TRUE,
  theme = reactableTheme(borderColor = "#dee2e6"),
  defaultPageSize = 20,
  columns = list(
    as_name = colDef(name = "Autonomous System", minWidth = 320),
    n       = colDef(name = "Active threat IPs", maxWidth = 140,
                     style = list(fontWeight = 600))
  )
)
```
